# NLTagger.Options

**Structure**

Constants for linguistic tagger enumeration specifying which tokens to omit and whether to join names.

## Declaration

```swift
struct Options
```

## Constants

- **omitWords**: Omit tokens of type [doc://com.apple.naturallanguage/documentation/NaturalLanguage/NLTag/word] (items considered to be words).
- **omitPunctuation**: Omit tokens of type [doc://com.apple.naturallanguage/documentation/NaturalLanguage/NLTag/punctuation] (all punctuation).
- **omitWhitespace**: Omit tokens of type [doc://com.apple.naturallanguage/documentation/NaturalLanguage/NLTag/whitespace] (whitespace of all sorts).
- **omitOther**: Omit tokens of type [doc://com.apple.naturallanguage/documentation/NaturalLanguage/NLTag/other] (non-linguistic items, such as symbols).
- **joinNames**: Typically, multiple-word names will be returned as multiple tokens, following the standard tokenization practice of the tagger.
- **joinContractions**: Contractions will be returned as one token.

## Initializers

- **init(rawValue:)**: Creates the option with a raw value.

## Enumerating linguistic tags

- **enumerateTags(in:unit:scheme:options:using:)**: Enumerates a block over the tagger’s string, given a range, token unit, and tag scheme.
- **NLTag**: A token type, lexical class, name, lemma, language, or script returned by a linguistic tagger for natural language text.

## Conforms To

- BitwiseCopyable
- Equatable
- ExpressibleByArrayLiteral
- OptionSet
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
- SetAlgebra
